Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts product data, promotions, and seasonal offerings from the website.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI chatbot on the R1 Concepts website, answering product questions, order inquiries, and fitment lookups.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand niche.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and prompt guidelines stored in Google Drive for the campaign.
